<!--
You may write in English or Chinese — either is fine.
你可以使用英文或中文填写，任选其一。
-->

## Summary / 概述

<!-- What does this PR do? / 这个 PR 做了什么？ -->

## Type of change / 变更类型

<!-- Check all that apply / 勾选所有适用项 -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature / 新功能
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix / 修复
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring / 重构
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only / 仅文档
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / build / config / 工具链、构建、配置
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests / 增加或修复测试

## Affected layer / 受影响的层

<!-- Which layer(s)? / 涉及哪一层？ -->

- [ ] token / lexer
- [ ] parser
- [ ] checker / types
- [ ] compiler
- [ ] cgen / C backend
- [ ] vm / runtime
- [ ] module system
- [ ] stdlib / natives
- [ ] docs / CI / other

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] This PR targets `main`. / 此 PR 指向 `main`。
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits. / 提交信息遵循 Conventional Commits 规范。
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or tokens are committed. / 未提交任何密钥、API Key 或 token。
- [ ] If compiler internals changed, the bootstrap fixpoint was verified. / 若修改了编译器内部，已验证自举定点。
- [ ] I understand this is a hobby project and review may be slow or may not happen. / 我理解这是兴趣项目，审阅可能很慢或不会进行。

## Related issues / 关联 issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
